  1. Home
  2. 5G
  3. 5G HQ

FOR BUSINESS LEADERS WITH VISION

WELCOME TO THE 5G ERA

As business needs evolve, understanding how technology can help you get ahead remains a challenge. But with the right perspective, every challenge becomes an opportunity. We’re here to help you envision opportunities with 5G and understand how it works for your business.

  • 5G HQ Home
    • Why 5G?
    • 5G & Security
    • Higher education
    • Healthcare
    • Retail
    • Construction
    • Manufacturing
    • Transportation & logistics
  • 5G Use Cases
  • 5G&You

See how 5G unlocks the full power of your business tech.

Fast. Responsive. Connected. See how businesses are leveraging the best of 5G networks to work more intelligently, more efficiently—and more profitably.

Why 5G and Wi-Fi 6 are better together.

Fast, reliable connectivity is paramount to digital transformation. Both 5G and Wi-Fi 6 offer advantages for business—with even bigger advantages when used together.

Learn why today

A new level of automation.

Realizing the benefits of automation depends on the connectivity you use. 5G's advanced networking capabilities extend automation beyond the reach of cables and fixed machines, making it easier for businesses like yours to cut operating costs, boost uptime, improve accuracy, and more.

Get the inside track

Why 5G for business?

While 5G isn’t new, it’s often misunderstood. We’re here to clarify misconceptions and shed light on how 5G’s power goes well beyond just smartphones.

From understanding why things like 5G spectrum and lower latency matter, to benefits like efficiency and scale, we’ll show you why 5G is a catalyst for business optimization and innovation.

Visit 5G in Business

How more bands make a better network.

A well-conceived 5G implementation plan balances growing demands for advanced wireless capabilities with a long-term vision, creating new efficiencies and opportunities.

Start the series

See what makes us different

T-Mobile’s 5G story.

Get an inside look at how the nation’s largest 5G network was born. Hear our story straight from the experts who built the network—from the industry firsts that made it possible, to the winning outcomes it’s driving for businesses.

Let’s talk about spectrum: more bands make a better network.

Learn about the range of 5G spectrum bands available—low-, mid-, and high-band—and how each performs valuable business functions. With access to all three bands, you can use our 5G network to unlock new use cases and outcomes from day one.

Get smart on spectrum

See how 5G impacts industry.

The impact of 5G is being realized throughout the business world. See how today’s applications and tomorrow’s innovations are moving industries forward

Higher education

5G offers a competitive advantage that enriches student experiences for the pioneers of tomorrow.

Explore education

Healthcare

Speed, capacity, and coverage will bring better healthcare to more people, while helping providers work more efficiently.

Explore healthcare

Retail

Ubiquitous, high-speed 5G can give retailers a 360-degree view of their business and create more personalized experiences.

Explore retail , opens in a new window

Construction

5G is connecting a new construction ecosystem that delivers projects with greater speed and safety, while reducing costs and accelerating worker expertise.

Explore construction

Manufacturing

With powerful, low-latency connections, 5G will make the smart factory more responsive, intelligent, and cost-efficient.

Explore manufacturing

Transportation & logistics

High bandwidth over vast distances can help prevent supply chain disruptions, optimize fleet operations, and reduce costs.

Explore transportation & logistics

FAQs: Our 5G cheat sheet.

Browse through questions from business leaders on their own path to digital transformation and get answers and advice on everything 5G.

Learn more from our experts

Ready to start building your 5G future?

1-833-349-0677
